batch_summary.note: Aug 2023: 1 primary RF-09 signal. S003 arc activation — ARC-RF09-001 WATCHING→ACTIVE.

primary_flags.message_text: Your gaslighting doesn't work on me
primary_flags.summary: Aug 2023: Melissa accuses Eli of gaslighting — third documented instance. ROW-2992: 'Your gaslighting doesn't work on me' — explicit DARVO inversion: Melissa positions herself as the victim of Eli's alleged psychological manipulation, while the text record documents Melissa's sustained emotional-manipulation campaign (RF-04 ARC-RF04-001 ACTIVE). Evidence Level E: reality-questioning language without a specific denied claim and without cross-referenceable contradiction. Arc transition: 3rd signal → ARC-RF09-001 WATCHING→ACTIVE. This is the arc activation event: three Level E signals in Phase A confirm a systematic pattern of accusing Eli of the behavior Melissa is demonstrably engaging in. ADD-004 arc escalation: Level E sustained across multiple conflict periods → Sev-1 arc confirmed ACTIVE. ADD-003 compound: DARVO sequence includes explicit gaslight accusation → RF-09+RF-04 COMP-RF09-003. Sub-pattern: DARVO-inversion (accusing Eli of gaslighting while engaging in documented DARVO) is the dominant early RF-09 mechanism.
